name: RYTHM, Inc.
summary: PART I . Unless otherwise stated or the context otherwise requires, references in this report to RYTHM, the Company, we, us, our, or similar references mean RYTHM, Inc. and its subsidiaries on a consolidated basis. Business Overview RYTHM, Inc. (formerly Agrify Corporation) (together with its subsidiaries, the Company or RYTHM) delivers well-being to consumers through its portfolio of hemp-derived tetrahydrocannabinol (hemp-derived THC) products and iconic licensed brands.
